title: acmispon argophyllus var. adsurgens
intro: Acmispon argophyllus var. adsurgens, also known as the coastal broom or bush broom, is a shrub native to the coastal regions of California and Oregon in the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acmispon argophyllus var. adsurgens include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
